{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Greth
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Greth]] is a worker in [[Ironville]] who inspects discarded technology.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
